overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a stormy rural landscape at dusk. The character passes a lone standing figure and approaches ancient stone ruins while dark clouds loom overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with wooden fencing

events.description: a lone figure becomes visible standing ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the stormy countryside

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on the path facing the approaching character

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running alongside the left of the path
muddy dirt trail winding through grassland
dense evergreen trees lining the horizon
misty mountains visible in the distance under dark clouds

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a fenced dirt path through stormy grassland. A lone figure stands motionless ahead on the path, facing the approaching character. Dark clouds cover the sky and misty mountains are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered stone ruins

events.description: passes the standing figure and exits the fenced area into wider open grassland
ancient stone tower becomes visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the figure into more open terrain with ruins

entered.detail: low crumbling stone walls alongside the path
tall ancient stone tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Passing the lone figure, the landscape opens into wider grassland as the wooden fence ends. Low stone ruins appear along the right side of the path, and a tall ancient stone tower becomes visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: path curves slightly right as the stone tower grows larger in the frame

agents.ego_description: walking toward the prominent stone tower now visible ahead on the right

segments.scene_description: The path continues toward the stone tower, which grows from a distant silhouette to a prominent structure on the right. A tall pine tree is passed on the right side as the character approaches the ancient fortification.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transitions from a confined, stormy grassland into an open landscape dominated by ancient ruins. It begins with Geralt walking beside a wooden fence under a heavy canopy of dark clouds, approaching a lone, motionless figure standing in the distance against a backdrop of misty mountains. As the character passes the figure, the fence ends and the terrain expands into wider grasslands, revealing low stone ruins lining the right side of the path. The scene then shifts focus toward a distant stone tower that grows from a silhouette into a prominent structure as the camera moves forward. Finally, the path leads past a tall pine tree and directly toward the imposing ancient fortification.
